theme: Do You Need to Declutter Your Home?

sentences.english: If your room is filled with heaps of clothes and piles of books, you may have a problem with clutter — things in your home which take up space in an untidy, disorganised way.
sentences.korean: 방이 옷 더미와 책 더미로 가득하다면 잡동사니(clutter) 문제가 있을 수 있어요 — 지저분하고 정리 안 된 상태로 공간을 차지하는 물건들이요.

sentences.english: Clutter was the topic of a recent episode of BBC Radio 4.
sentences.korean: 잡동사니가 BBC 라디오 4 최근 에피소드의 주제였어요.

sentences.english: One listener said: 'The clutter in my house is actually starting to affect my mental health.'
sentences.korean: 한 청취자는 '집의 잡동사니가 정신 건강에 영향을 미치기 시작했다'고 했어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Do You Need to Declutter Your Home?
Embarrassed to go to the doctor?
Would You Like a Robot Companion?
